name: Cherubi
flavor: It nimbly dashes about to avoid getting pecked by bird Pokémon that would love to make off with its small, nutrient-rich storage ball.

ability.name: En-fruits-iastic
ability.effect: If this Pokémon has a Pokémon Tool attached, attacks used by this Pokémon cost 1 less [Grass] Energy.

attacks.name: Sweets Relay
attacks.effect: If 1 of your Pokémon used Sweets Relay during your last turn, this attack does 20 more damage.
